projectDescription: An AI-powered job application framework built on Claude Code that lets you fork, fill in your profile, and have Claude evaluate jobs, tailor CVs, write cover letters, and prepare you for interviews.
keyFeatures: Drafter-reviewer two-agent workflow for CV and cover letter generation
Mandatory PDF compilation and visual inspection with layout fixing
ATS parseability verification on compiled CV text layer
Relevance-weighted CV cutting when overflowing page limits
Multi-portal job scraping (Jobindex, Jobbank, Jobdanmark, Jobnet, LinkedIn)
Batch job scoring with parallel agents via /rank
Competency enrichment from public profiles and documents via /expand
Skill gap analysis and learning plan via /upskill
Salary benchmarking with fuzzy company name matching
Application outcome tracking that calibrates the fit framework over time
publicApiSurface: /setup — onboard profile via documents folder, CV import, or interview
/setup --section <name> — update a specific profile section
/scrape — search job portals for matching positions
/apply <url|text> — full drafter-reviewer application workflow
/rank — batch-score scraped jobs into a ranked shortlist
/rank --top <N> — shortlist size override
/rank --all — re-rank all non-applied jobs
/outcome <company> — record application results and archive materials
/expand — enrich profile from public online presence
/upskill — skill gap analysis and learning plan
/upskill <url> — skill gap against a specific posting
/add-template — register custom LaTeX CV or cover letter template
/add-template --list — list registered templates
/add-template --use <name> — activate a template
/add-portal — scaffold a job-portal search skill for any market
/add-portal --list — list installed portal skills
/reset profile|documents|all — wipe profile data
salary_lookup.py <company> — CLI salary benchmark lookup
salary_lookup.py --json — machine-readable output
tools/convert_salary_excel.py — convert Excel salary data to JSON
